title: Large Capacity Dish Rack and Utensil Drainer Stainless Steel Kitchen Organizer Drying Storage Rack for Dishes Cups
detail_text: ✨Welcome to SG Local Wholesale~ SG Local Stock | 48-Hour Fast Shipping | 2-3 Day Delivery 🍽️ Stainless Steel Plate & Bowl Organizer Rack Set 🍽️ Keep your kitchen cabinets neat, organized, and space-efficient with this durable stainless steel rack set! Designed to store plates and bowls vertically, it makes accessing your dinnerware easy while protecting them from scratches and clutter. 🌟 Product Highlights: Space-Saving Vertical Design: Stores plates and bowls upright, maximizing cabinet space and allowing you to quickly see and grab what you need without moving stacks. Sturdy 201 Stainless Steel: Made from rust-resistant, easy-to-clean stainless steel that withstands daily use and keeps your dinnerware secure and stable. Dual-Rack Efficiency: Includes a plate rack (holds up to 8 plates) and a bowl rack (holds up to 8 bowls), helping you organize two essential dish types in one compact system. Easy to Clean & Maintain: Smooth surfaces and open design prevent dirt buildup. Simply wipe with a damp cloth or rinse under water. 🛠 Enhanced Experience Tips: Adjust for Plate Size: The plate rack accommodates standard-sized plates (up to ~10” diameter). 🌟 Product Highlights:

Space-Saving Vertical Design: Stores plates and bowls upright, maximizing cabinet space and allowing you to quickly see and grab what you need without moving stacks.

Sturdy 201 Stainless Steel: Made from rust-resistant, easy-to-clean stainless steel that withstands daily use and keeps your dinnerware secure and stable.

Adjust for Plate Size: The plate rack accommodates standard-sized plates (up to ~10” diameter). For larger plates, ensure cabinet depth allows comfortable placement.

Place in Dry Cabinets: Although stainless steel is rust-resistant, store in a dry cabinet to prolong shine and prevent moisture spots.

Combine with Other Organizers: Pair with cutlery trays, shelf risers, or drawer dividers to create a fully organized kitchen cabinet.

title: Heat-Resistant Kitchen Tongs
detail_text: Versatile Use This tool is not just for cooking but also serves as a microwave-safe utensil, perfect for steaming vegetables and dishes. Easy to Clean The silicone material makes it easy to clean, ensuring hygiene and longevity of the product. Swiss Anti-Scalding Design The Swiss anti-scalding design ensures safety while handling hot pots, bowls, and plates, making it ideal for kitchen use. Silicone Material Made from durable silicone, this tool is heat-resistant and can withstand high temperatures without deforming. Multi-functional Tool It's a multi-functional tool that can be used as a pot holder, dish remover, or even a vegetable clamp, enhancing kitchen efficiency.
